summary: 3 of 4 pilot pages have broken images (homepage 3/3, FAQ 1/1); FAQ and Treatment/lips not accessible at canonical da.live source path (404 without .html extension)

homepage.imageRatio: N/A (0 in cleaned.html, 3 in da.live source; all 3 broken on preview)

treatment_lips.imageRatio: 11/0 in cleaned.html = all in da.live source; images loading correctly via EDS pipeline

faq.imageRatio: 1 preview img vs 2 cleaned.html imgs = 0.50 (borderline); hero image broken on preview

disclaimer.notes: Empty metadata description field. Content complete and faithful.

issues.criterion: da.live source API accessibility at canonical path
issues.details: FAQ page at /nl/qa returns HTTP 404 from admin.da.live source API. Treatment/lips at /nl/treatment/lips also returns HTTP 404. Both pages were uploaded with .html extension and are only accessible at /nl/qa.html and /nl/treatment/lips.html respectively. The canonical EDS path without extension resolves to 404. Evidence: `curl -H 'Authorization: Bearer ...' https://admin.da.live/source/jmffraiz/jv-test-5/nl/qa` → 404; `https://admin.da.live/source/jmffraiz/jv-test-5/nl/qa.html` → 200 (16117 bytes).
issues.remediation: Upload FAQ and Treatment/lips documents without the .html extension in da.live (delete the .html-suffixed document and re-upload as path-only), or ensure the da.live admin API recognizes both paths. EDS canonical path resolution requires the no-extension form to return 200.

issues.details: Homepage preview at https://main--jv-test-5--jmffraiz.aem.page/ has 3 broken images. The da.live source references: /media/homepage/treatment-vrouwelijk.jpg, /media/homepage/treatment-mannelijk.jpg, /media/homepage/icon-kijk-uit.png. All 3 return HTTP 404. In preview HTML, image src attributes contain 'about:error'. Evidence: `curl -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://main--jv-test-5--jmffraiz.aem.page/media/homepage/treatment-vrouwelijk.jpg` → 404.
issues.remediation: Upload the homepage images to the EDS media pipeline. Use the AEM admin API to upload images and obtain proper hash-based media URLs (e.g., ./media_<hash>.webp), then update the da.live source document to reference these URLs. Alternatively, use absolute URLs pointing to the original juvederm.nl CDN.

issues.details: FAQ preview at https://main--jv-test-5--jmffraiz.aem.page/nl/qa has a broken hero image. The da.live source references /media/nl-qa/hero-bg.jpg which returns HTTP 404. In preview HTML, the single img element has src='about:error'. Evidence: `curl -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://main--jv-test-5--jmffraiz.aem.page/media/nl-qa/hero-bg.jpg` → 404.
issues.remediation: Upload the FAQ hero image to the EDS media pipeline and update the da.live source for /nl/qa.html to reference the proper hash-based media URL.

issues.details: All 4 preview pages emit a console error for missing metadata.js module. This is a repo setup issue where the metadata block JS file is not present in the project. Not a migration-specific issue but affects overall page functionality.
issues.remediation: Add metadata.js to the EDS project repo blocks/metadata/ directory or ensure the block is properly imported from the block collection.

issues.details: The disclaimer page da.live source at /nl/disclaimer has an empty description field in the Metadata block: `description`. No SEO description will be rendered for this page.
issues.remediation: Add a meaningful description value to the Metadata block in the disclaimer da.live document.

issues.criterion: Homepage video URL uses non-standard scheme
issues.details: The homepage da.live source references a video with src pointing to the original juvederm.nl CDN. The worker noted ERR_UNKNOWN_URL_SCHEME errors in the console. The video element in the Hero (video) block uses an absolute URL to the AEM DAM which may have CORS or scheme issues.
issues.remediation: Upload the hero video to the EDS media store or confirm CORS headers are set correctly on the source CDN to allow cross-origin loading.
